name: vibehub-plugin
description: Plugin-first local context runtime for Claude Code and Codex, with an optional Workbench App.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @vibehub/core build && pnpm --filter @vibehub/cli build && pnpm --filter @vibehub/workbench-mcp build && pnpm --filter @vibehub/workbench-app build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @vibehub/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @vibehub/cli typecheck && pnpm --filter @vibehub/workbench-mcp typecheck && pnpm --filter @vibehub/workbench-app typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @vibehub/core test && pnpm --filter @vibehub/cli test && pnpm --filter @vibehub/workbench-mcp test && pnpm --filter @vibehub/workbench-app test
scripts.build:claude-marketplace: pnpm --filter @vibehub/core build && pnpm --filter @vibehub/cli build && pnpm --filter @vibehub/workbench-mcp build && node scripts/build-claude-marketplace.mjs
scripts.build:codex-marketplace: pnpm --filter @vibehub/core build && pnpm --filter @vibehub/cli build && pnpm --filter @vibehub/workbench-mcp build && node scripts/build-codex-marketplace.mjs
scripts.build:release-marketplace: pnpm --filter @vibehub/core build && pnpm --filter @vibehub/cli build && pnpm --filter @vibehub/workbench-mcp build && node scripts/build-release-marketplace.mjs
scripts.verify: pnpm build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm verify:e2e:production && pnpm verify:bundle && pnpm verify:artifact && pnpm verify:codex-plugin && pnpm dogfood
